/app/config.description: Choose a Share for the MediathekArr config. Eg. create a share called mediathekarr-config for this purpose.
/app/config.label: Config

/downloads.description: Choose a Share for MediathekArr downloads. Eg: create a Share called mediathekarr-downloads for this purpose alone.
/downloads.label: Download Storage

PUID.description: Enter a valid UID to run MediathekArr as. It must have full permissions to all Shares mapped in the previous step.
PUID.label: UID to run MediathekArr as.

PGID.description: Enter a valid GID to use along with the above UID. It(or the above UID) must have full permissions to all Shares mapped in the previous step.
PGID.label: GID to run MediathekArr as.

mediathekarr.description: Integrate ARD&ZDF Mediathek in Prowlarr, Sonarr and Radarr
